description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Visual Studio 2022 that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch, and can be triggered manually. The workflow should have two jobs, build_cmake and build_meson, both running on a Windows 2022 environment. The build_cmake job checks out the repository, sets up MSBuild, installs vcpkg, configures and builds a project using CMake, and uploads a distribution archive. The build_meson job checks out the repository, sets up Python, installs Meson and Ninja, configures and builds a project using Meson, and tests the project.
